title: Japan's Monoliths: Carved Giants

scenes.text: Ancient granite monoliths found in Japan, with no records of their origin.
These impressive structures are scattered across Japan, hidden in history.
Discovered in modern times, these monoliths weigh up to 800 tonnes yet remain unrecorded in history.
Photographs of the monoliths intrigue archaeologists but offer no explanations.
Their purpose and the culture that created them remain a source of speculation.
scenes.label: PURPOSE STILL UNKNOWN

scenes.text: Follow for a new mystery every day.

description: 📍 Various, Japan - Year Unknown. Enormous granite monoliths were found across the country with no historical records, raising endless questions. Follow for daily mysteries!
